item.description: pAI Spending Pushes Alphabet to First-Ever Negative Free Cash Flowbr /br /Alphabet’s second-quarter capital spending doubled from a year earlier to USD 44.92 billion, pushing quarterly free cash flow to a record-low negative USD 5.86 billion—the company’s first-ever negative reading. item.title: After 3000 hours of meditation I'm convinced multi-agent models of mind are just true
item.description: pspanEpistemic status: first-person phenomenology/spanbr /br /spanI've combined meditation and parts work (like IFS) and the results are, well, bizarre. I taught myself to notice little mental threads that run like computer programs and just drop them:/span/ppispan“Amazingly, when I mentally labeled

item.title: In other words: The influence of prompt variation on alignment evals
item.description: pspanIf alignment evaluations are phrased differently, does model behaviour change? In this post, we describe our attempt to answer this question. This project was completed as a 5-day project sprint during the Capstone Week of ARENA 8.0./span/ppspanTL;DR: The data we collected were noisy! Almost ev

item.title: Attackers Are Learning to Live Off the AI Toolchain
item.description: Sandworm_Mode is an early example of malware that exploits trusted AI tools and workflows to make malicious activity virtually indistinguishable from normal activity.

item.title: Will almost all future companies eventually be founded and run by autonomous AIs?

item.title: We cannot simulate AI security research
item.description: pspanWe use AI agents not only for writing but also for maintaining and deploying code. The most widespread examples are found in GitHub Actions Marketplace, which contains over a thousand AI-assisted actions./spanspan class="footnote-reference" id="fnrefcklq2719jn"supa href="https://www.lesswrong.c

item.title: OpenAI Model Hacks Into HuggingFace During Cybersecurity Evaluation
item.description: pThis latest incident is a rather dramatic escalation in agentic AI cybersecurity breaches. It was severe enough to have been initially reported to authorities, before either HuggingFace or OpenAI understood what was happening./pblockquotepa href="https://x.com/sama/status/2079661132302995790"Sam Al

item.title: The real disruption isn't AI discovering new biology. It's AI compressing decades of biomedical research into days. Dr. Derya Unutmaz says AI is rapidly becoming a scientific co-researcher, not just a
item.description: pThe real disruption isn't AI discovering new biology. It's AI compressing decades of biomedical research into days.br /br /Dr. Derya Unutmaz says AI is rapidly becoming a scientific co-researcher, not just a chatbot.br /br /Rather than spending months analyzing massive biological datasets, research

item.title: José explains why he remains bullish on AI infrastructure. “The market reacts very strongly to things like Meta announcing they’re selling compute... I don’t think it’s very rational. I still think ow
item.description: pJosé explains why he remains bullish on AI infrastructure.br /br /“The market reacts very strongly to things like Meta announcing they’re selling compute... I don’t think it’s very rational. I still think owning land and having power is going to be incredibly valuable going forward.”/pa href="https

item.title: Franklin Templeton Says Altcoins Are Key to the Agentic AI Trade
item.description: Digital assets head Sandy Kaul argues card rails can't handle $0.001 machine payments, making blockchain tokens the way to capture agentic AI value.

item.description: pAI has started building its own successors.br /br /It's happening right now. Humans still kick most of it off, but the models are already training the next models, and each version builds a better version faster than the last.br /br /We know what happens when something gets an advantage and the sub

item.title: When AI Attacks: OpenAI Models Autonomously Hack Hugging Face
item.description: Advanced LLMs escaped their sandboxes while attempting to achieve a non-malicious benchmark test objective.
